attached_docs: KFM Markdown Modernization & GitHub Documentation Implementation Agent v4.0.0
Kansas Frontier Matrix — AI Build Operating Contract.md

validation_gates.reason: Repository identity, permissions, default branch, current base, target blob, child lanes, command surfaces, workflow definitions, CODEOWNERS, Directory Rules, drift register, and generated-receipt schema were inspected.
All 1,067 lines of the v0.3 target were read in bounded GitHub ranges, including metadata, headings, tables, examples, anchors, links, changelog, and final boundary text.
Main remained fae69bb52e0ebc7670dc7d20c9eb05cb587520ff, the target remained blob f603cb013ff86511a65dae4799c54d77c029e082 before mutation, and no overlapping open PR or branch was surfaced.
The existing canonical scripts/ root README was updated in place; no root, authority home, lifecycle phase, schema, contract, policy, registry, proof, release, or public path was created or moved.

The README was re-grounded after 854 intervening commits against child-lane documentation, package and Make commands, both relevant workflows, CODEOWNERS, Directory Rules, the drift register, and the MapLibre candidate-builder sources.

The first twelve H2 sections exactly match Purpose, Authority level, Status, What belongs here, What does NOT belong here, Inputs, Outputs, Validation, Review burden, Related folders, ADRs, and Last reviewed.
MarkdownIt parsed 1,525 tokens; one H1 and twenty-four H2 sections were found; fenced blocks and details tags are balanced.
Forty-five internal fragments resolve; two custom anchors are unique; legacy fragments are retained; twenty-two repository-relative destinations were inspected.
Six static Shields badge URLs are syntactically valid and link to evidence-bearing sections; no dynamic CI, release, coverage, or maturity badge was added.
The validation environment could not resolve img.shields.io, so endpoint reachability was not claimed.

Stable identity, path, H1, authority boundary, child lanes, MapLibre inventory, execution and output controls, finite outcomes, graduation, validation, review, ADR, rollback, verification backlog, and legacy fragments were preserved.

No private-key block, common GitHub/OpenAI/AWS token pattern, credential, private endpoint, sensitive location, living-person data, genomic data, infrastructure detail, or restricted payload was introduced.
GitHub returned blob 8ab7b3f740f21822310fa8bf40a18527bf2057a1, matching the reconstructed and revalidated 53,299-byte remote content.
Documentation/provenance-only change; no script, command, dependency, fixture, validator, workflow, runtime, release, or public behavior changed.
Repository checks run after draft pull-request creation and were unavailable at receipt emission time.

notes: AI-authored documentation-only modernization on a scoped review branch. The root scripts README is upgraded in place, re-grounded to current workflows and drift evidence, and reordered to the required root README contract. It preserves the operational-helper boundary, records the MapLibre runtime hold and trust-shaped artifact conflict, and makes no executable, schema, contract, policy, fixture, workflow, lifecycle, release, deployment, or public-surface change. Human review remains pending; this receipt is process provenance, not approval, proof, release authority, or publication authority.
